title: [apiv2] fails with 'strconv.ParseUint: parsing \"tcp\": invalid syntax'
body:
<!--
---------------------------------------------------
BUG REPORT INFORMATION
---------------------------------------------------
Use the commands below to provide key information from your environment:
You do NOT have to include this information if this is a FEATURE REQUEST

**NOTE** A large number of issues reported against Podman are often found to already be fixed
in more current versions of the project.  Before reporting an issue, please verify the
version you are running with `podman version` and compare it to the latest release
documented on the top of Podman's [README.md](../README.md).  If they differ, please
update your version of Podman to the latest possible and retry your command before creating
an issue.

If you are filing a bug against `podman build`, please instead file a bug
against Buildah (https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues). Podman build
executes Buildah to perform container builds, and as such the Buildah
maintainers are best equipped to handle these bugs.
-->

**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**
/kind bug

**Description**
Podman API returns an error when querying information on a running container when its ports are published
<!--
Briefly describe the problem you are having in a few paragraphs.
-->

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. Run container and publish the container's port on TCP/80
```
podman run -d -p 80:80 --name hello-world-publish hello-world
```

2. Use cURL to get information about the running container
```
curl --unix-socket /run/podman/podman.sock http://d/v1.24/containers/hello-world-publish/json
```

**Describe the results you received:**
Results in the following error
```
{"cause":"strconv.ParseUint: parsing \"tcp\": invalid syntax","message":"strconv.ParseUint: parsing \"tcp\": invalid syntax","response":500}
```

**Describe the results you expected:**
Running the container without publishing the container's ports produces the expected results
```
podman run -d --name hello-world-no-publish hello-world
curl --unix-socket /run/podman/podman.sock http://d/v1.24/containers/hello-world-no-publish/json
{"Id":"d7737cc7830697339c959680471ca2f935d308ab224b4a20b4e709cbbec9ec23","Created":"2020-06-07 18:18:36.995721759 -0700 PDT","Path":"","Args":null,"State":{"Status":"exited","Running":false,"Paused":false,"Restarting":false,"OOMKilled":false,"Dead":false,"Pid":0,"ExitCode":0,"Error":"","StartedAt":"2020-06-07T18:18:37.378473314-07:00","FinishedAt":"2020-06-07T18:18:37.389464784-07:00"},"Image":"docker.io/library/hello-world:latest","ResolvConfPath":"/var/run/containers/storage/overlay-containers/d7737cc7830697339c959680471ca2f935d308ab224b4a20b4e709cbbec9ec23/userdata/resolv.conf","HostnamePath":"/var/run/containers/storage/overlay-containers/d7737cc7830697339c959680471ca2f935d308ab224b4a20b4e709cbbec9ec23/userdata/hostname","HostsPath":"/var/run/containers/storage/overlay-containers/d7737cc7830697339c959680471ca2f935d308ab224b4a20b4e709cbbec9ec23/userdata/hosts","LogPath":"/var/lib/containers/storage/overlay-containers/d7737cc7830697339c959680471ca2f935d308ab224b4a20b4e709cbbec9ec23/userdata/ctr.log","Name":"/hello-world-no-publish","RestartCount":0,"Driver":"overlay","Platform":"linux","MountLabel":"system_u:object_r:container_file_t:s0:c660,c764","ProcessLabel":"system_u:system_r:container_t:s0:c660,c764","AppArmorProfile":"","ExecIDs":[],"HostConfig":{"Binds":[],"ContainerIDFile":"","LogConfig":{"Type":"k8s-file","Config":null},"NetworkMode":"bridge","PortBindings":{},"RestartPolicy":{"Name":"","MaximumRetryCount":0},"AutoRemove":false,"VolumeDriver":"","VolumesFrom":null,"CapAdd":[],"CapDrop":[],"Capabilities":null,"CgroupnsMode":"","Dns":[],"DnsOptions":[],"DnsSearch":[],"ExtraHosts":[],"GroupAdd":[],"IpcMode":"private","Cgroup":"","Links":null,"OomScoreAdj":0,"PidMode":"private","Privileged":false,"PublishAllPorts":false,"ReadonlyRootfs":false,"SecurityOpt":[],"UTSMode":"private","UsernsMode":"","ShmSize":65536000,"Runtime":"oci","ConsoleSize":[0,0],"Isolation":"","CpuShares":0,"Memory":0,"NanoCpus":0,"CgroupParent":"","BlkioWeight":0,"BlkioWeightDevice":null,"BlkioDeviceReadBps":null,"BlkioDeviceWriteBps":null,"BlkioDeviceReadIOps":null,"BlkioDeviceWriteIOps":null,"CpuPeriod":0,"CpuQuota":0,"CpuRealtimePeriod":0,"CpuRealtimeRuntime":0,"CpusetCpus":"","CpusetMems":"","Devices":[],"DeviceCgroupRules":null,"DeviceRequests":null,"KernelMemory":0,"KernelMemoryTCP":0,"MemoryReservation":0,"MemorySwap":0,"MemorySwappiness":0,"OomKillDisable":false,"PidsLimit":4096,"Ulimits":[{"Name":"RLIMIT_NOFILE","Hard":1048576,"Soft":1048576},{"Name":"RLIMIT_NPROC","Hard":4194304,"Soft":4194304}],"CpuCount":0,"CpuPercent":0,"IOMaximumIOps":0,"IOMaximumBandwidth":0,"MaskedPaths":null,"ReadonlyPaths":null},"GraphDriver":{"Data":{"LowerDir":"/var/lib/containers/storage/overlay/9c27e219663c25e0f28493790cc0b88bc973ba3b1686355f221c38a36978ac63/diff","UpperDir":"/var/lib/containers/storage/overlay/8b5f5bf4feb4b63650c538088b75050b28d843693f4912c1c948a69de9c14e3a/diff","WorkDir":"/var/lib/containers/storage/overlay/8b5f5bf4feb4b63650c538088b75050b28d843693f4912c1c948a69de9c14e3a/work"},"Name":"overlay"},"SizeRootFs":0,"Mounts":[],"Config":{"Hostname":"d7737cc78306","Domainname":"","User":"","AttachStdin":false,"AttachStdout":false,"AttachStderr":false,"Tty":false,"OpenStdin":false,"StdinOnce":false,"Env":["PATH=/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin","TERM=xterm","container=podman","HOSTNAME=d7737cc78306","HOME="],"Cmd":["/hello"],"Image":"docker.io/library/hello-world:latest","Volumes":null,"WorkingDir":"/","Entrypoint":[],"OnBuild":null,"Labels":{},"StopSignal":"\u0000","StopTimeout":10},"NetworkSettings":{"Bridge":"","SandboxID":"","HairpinMode":false,"LinkLocalIPv6Address":"","LinkLocalIPv6PrefixLen":0,"Ports":null,"SandboxKey":"","SecondaryIPAddresses":null,"SecondaryIPv6Addresses":null,"EndpointID":"","Gateway":"","GlobalIPv6Address":"","GlobalIPv6PrefixLen":0,"IPAddress":"","IPPrefixLen":0,"IPv6Gateway":"","MacAddress":"","Networks":null}}
```

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**
Request fails with multiple images tested when publishing a port. Tested multiple ports as well with same error.

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
Version:      2.0.0-dev
API Version:  1
Go Version:   go1.14.3
Git Commit:   7e181c6bfe6b033e2ae53ce4f63b086e8cf5ea38
Built:        Thu Jun  4 17:00:00 2020
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64
```

comments.body: @zhangguanzhang Thanks for addressing this issue so quickly!
